input.target_description: GET /api/v1/orders?cursor=<opaque>&limit=<int> — returns 100 orders max per page; cursor is opaque base64; response includes next_cursor or null. Used in production for 18 months.

input.target_description: POST /oauth/token — RFC 6749 token endpoint. Supports password and refresh_token grants. Returns 200 with {access_token, token_type, expires_in, refresh_token} or 400 with {error, error_description}.
